inputs.text: Mujhe bahut tezi se bukhar chadh gaya hai, sir bhi bahut dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of fever and headache is common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache can be symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, the symptoms are not specific to Dengue at this stage

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are indicative of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Although joint pain is common in Chikungunya, the presence of retro-orbital pain makes Dengue more likely

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: These symptoms are not typical of viral fever

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aaya hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash and bleeding gums, along with the previous symptoms, confirms Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of symptoms is less typical of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with different symptoms, such as chills and rigors

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, petechiae bhi hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of petechiae and extreme weakness confirms the diagnosis of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific symptoms and signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of typical symptoms of Malaria
